title: rubus × conjunctus
intro: Rubus × conjunctus, also known as the hybrid blackberry or black raspberry, is a cross between the Rubus argutus and Rubus occidentalis species, resulting in a unique plant with combined characteristics. The medicinal properties of Rubus × conjunctus lie in its high anthocyanin and ellagic acid content, which are known for their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × conjunctus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage and cancer. Rubus × conjunctus can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, jams, and supplements, which are often used to support overall health and wellness.
